narrative:
Kettering City Sd city school district has 41,048 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.4% D−R vs -13.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
